title: MaceLimiter
description: A minecraft plugin to limit the maces usage.
body:
[![Craftlands](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1456750543254061199/1457164304016085246/CREATE_SERVER_6.png?ex=695b0182&is=6959b002&hm=a2cb2f7c066a0720fb2c2c4731c303fe0ba9aabc6e13418454c31a8482656f0b&)](https://portal.craftlands.host/aff.php?aff=137)


<iframe width="140" height="79" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/MkwhlkNWuu0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


Macelimiter is a optimized, customisable plugin that helps server owners manage the enchantment limits on all items (mainly the mace). It has built in features such as limiting crafts and disabling crafters. Macelimiter gives you the control you need that other plugins doesnt.

# Features

## Enchantment Limiting

Restrict what enchantments items can be enchanted with.

## Mace Limiting System 

Define how many maces can exist globally.

## Rituals

Custom rituals occur the first time a mace is made and its duration can be changed aswell as its toggelable in the config.yml file

## Cooldown System 
Toggelable cooldowns and setable cooldown durations are in config.yml

# Others

## Config
![Macelimter Config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05d724efe77ef055dc0dc21b1e3e7ab9a777b732.png)

## Performance?
It is optimized for servers and doesnt use much resources!

## Commands
It also comes with useful commands such as reload, reset, toggle, status and togglecooldown!

## Why Macelimiter?
Maces are extrememly overpowered and even more so with the enchantments they can withheld. This is where Macelimiter comes in, it limits the mace's enchants aswell as their overall quantaties to make sure the server is kept fair. As a bonus it works on all items for enchantments so it brings overall balancing

Whether you're worried about fair-play or don't want to see others abusing the overpowered enchantments, Macelimiter is here to help
